rules.error: Invalid mandatory input. Calculation must fail.
rules.warning: Fallback, simplification, missing optional assumption or partial source. Calculation may succeed.
rules.info: Method, source, status or metadata. Calculation may succeed.
rules.successRule: A successful calculation result must not contain CalculationDiagnosticSeverity.Error.

diagnostics.userMessage: Building id must not be negative.
diagnostics.userAction: Check the building selection and retry the annual energy calculation.

diagnostics.userMessage: Building area must be greater than zero for EUI calculation.
diagnostics.userAction: Enter a positive building area before calculating annual EUI.

diagnostics.userMessage: At least one hourly energy balance input is required.
diagnostics.userAction: Provide hourly records or run a calculation path that generates hourly inputs.

diagnostics.userMessage: Hour duration must be greater than zero.
diagnostics.userAction: Check the hourly weather/profile source and remove invalid hour durations.

diagnostics.userMessage: Month must be between 1 and 12.
diagnostics.userAction: Check hourly profile month mapping.

diagnostics.userMessage: Hourly input count is not 8760; annual totals use the supplied calculation period.
diagnostics.userAction: Do not present this result as true hourly annual 8760 simulation unless HourlyRecordCount is 8760.

diagnostics.userMessage: Synthetic weather profile was used for annual energy balance.
diagnostics.userAction: Use EPW or PVGIS normalized weather for weather-driven annual analysis.

diagnostics.userMessage: Synthetic weather profile was used; solar/weather source data is representative rather than true hourly weather.
diagnostics.userAction: Treat the result as representative, not a true external weather simulation.

diagnostics.userMessage: Annual energy balance was calculated from true hourly simulation records.
diagnostics.userAction: This supports true hourly annual reporting when the 8760 flags are also satisfied.

diagnostics.userMessage: Annual energy balance was calculated from hourly records, but the record count is not 8760.
diagnostics.userAction: Use the result for the supplied period only; do not label it as full annual 8760.

diagnostics.userMessage: Annual energy balance uses representative monthly records generated from monthly balances; this is not a true hourly 8760 simulation.
diagnostics.userAction: Show this as an adapted monthly balance, not true hourly 8760 simulation.

diagnostics.userMessage: Annual energy balance source data is unavailable.
diagnostics.userAction: Generate or import source records before annual energy calculation.

diagnostics.userMessage: Annual energy balance contains signed component totals.
diagnostics.userAction: Positive net values mean heat gain to the building; negative net values mean heat loss from the building.

diagnostics.userMessage: A negative hourly component was clamped to zero.
diagnostics.userAction: Review the component source if this appears unexpectedly.

diagnostics.userMessage: Useful heating energy cannot be negative.
diagnostics.userAction: Correct useful heating energy input.

diagnostics.userMessage: Useful cooling energy cannot be negative.
diagnostics.userAction: Correct useful cooling energy input.

diagnostics.userMessage: Useful DHW energy cannot be negative.
diagnostics.userAction: Correct useful DHW energy input.

diagnostics.userMessage: Fan energy cannot be negative.
diagnostics.userAction: Correct fan energy input.

diagnostics.userMessage: Heating efficiency must be greater than zero.
diagnostics.userAction: Enter a positive heating efficiency.

diagnostics.userMessage: Heating COP must be greater than zero.
diagnostics.userAction: Enter a positive heating COP.

diagnostics.userMessage: Cooling COP must be greater than zero.
diagnostics.userAction: Enter a positive cooling COP.

diagnostics.userMessage: DHW efficiency must be greater than zero.
diagnostics.userAction: Enter a positive DHW efficiency.

diagnostics.userMessage: DHW COP must be greater than zero.
diagnostics.userAction: Enter a positive DHW COP.

diagnostics.userMessage: Primary energy factor must be greater than zero.
diagnostics.userAction: Enter a positive primary energy factor.

diagnostics.userMessage: No heating efficiency or COP was supplied; useful heating energy was carried through as final energy.
diagnostics.userAction: Provide heating efficiency or COP for final energy conversion.

diagnostics.userMessage: No cooling COP was supplied; useful cooling energy was carried through as final energy.
diagnostics.userAction: Provide cooling COP for final energy conversion.

diagnostics.userMessage: No DHW efficiency or COP was supplied; useful DHW energy was carried through as final energy.
diagnostics.userAction: Provide DHW efficiency or COP for final energy conversion.

diagnostics.userMessage: Target id must not be negative.
diagnostics.userAction: Check the selected sizing target.

diagnostics.userMessage: Required heating load cannot be negative.
diagnostics.userAction: Recalculate heating load or correct sizing input.

diagnostics.userMessage: Required cooling load cannot be negative.
diagnostics.userAction: Recalculate cooling load or correct sizing input.

diagnostics.userMessage: Safety factor must be greater than zero.
diagnostics.userAction: Enter a positive safety factor.

diagnostics.userMessage: Heating safety factor must be greater than zero.
diagnostics.userAction: Enter a positive heating safety factor.

diagnostics.userMessage: Cooling safety factor must be greater than zero.
diagnostics.userAction: Enter a positive cooling safety factor.

diagnostics.userMessage: Heating safety factor was not supplied and documented default was used.
diagnostics.userAction: Confirm default safety factor is acceptable.

diagnostics.userMessage: Cooling safety factor was not supplied and documented default was used.
diagnostics.userAction: Confirm default safety factor is acceptable.

diagnostics.userMessage: Heating safety factor was applied.
diagnostics.userAction: Use this value when reviewing selected equipment capacity margin.

diagnostics.userMessage: Cooling safety factor was applied.
diagnostics.userAction: Use this value when reviewing selected equipment capacity margin.

diagnostics.userMessage: No equipment candidates were supplied.
diagnostics.userAction: Add equipment candidates before expecting recommendations.

diagnostics.userMessage: No equipment candidate satisfied the sizing requirements.
diagnostics.userAction: Review required load, safety factor or equipment catalog.

diagnostics.userMessage: Room area must not be negative.
diagnostics.userAction: Correct room geometry before aggregation.

diagnostics.userMessage: No rooms were supplied for load aggregation.
diagnostics.userAction: Check room assignment to building, floor or thermal zone.

diagnostics.userMessage: Hourly aggregation is not available; design-point aggregation was used.
diagnostics.userAction: Provide hourly profiles for coincident hourly aggregation.

diagnostics.userMessage: Boundary temperature is required for this transmission element.
diagnostics.userAction: Provide adjacent, boundary or outdoor temperature for the element.
